panels.description: The official product name of the GPU. This is an alphanumeric string. For all products.
panels.title: GPU Card

panels.description: The version of the installed NVIDIA display driver. This is an alphanumeric string.
panels.title: Driver Version

targets.expr: sum by(instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter", mode="system"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by(instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter", mode="user"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by(instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter", mode="iowait"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by(instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter", mode=~".*irq"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by(instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter", mode!='idle',mode!='user',mode!='system',mode!='iowait',mode!='irq',mode!='softirq'}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter"}[$__rate_interval])))

sum by(instance) (irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter", mode="idle"}[$__rate_interval])) / on(instance) group_left sum by (instance)((irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{instance="$server",job="nodeexporter"}[$__rate_interval])))

matcher.options: Hardware Corrupted - Amount of RAM that the kernel identified as corrupted / not working

panels.description: Disk space used of all filesystems mounted
panels.title: Disk Space Used Basic

panels.description:
In this kanban: the total disk, usage, available, and usage rate are consistent with the values of the Size, Used, Avail, and Use% columns of the df command, and the value of Use% will be rounded to one decimal place, which will be more accurate .

Note: The Use% algorithm in df is: (size-free) * 100 / (avail + (size-free)), the result is divisible by this value, non-divisible by this value is +1, and the unit of the result is %.
Refer to the df command source code:
panels.title: Disk Space Used Basic(EXT?/XFS)
